log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Elf — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Elf — Iron Concentration.
→ Elf — Iron Concentration: CON save [d20:11+8=19 vs DC 20] FAIL! 37 necrotic damage. HP: 30/67
--- Elf — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:11+9=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Elf — Iron Concentration.

--- Elf — Iron Concentration's turn ---

→ Elf — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
